name: Proto.io Interactive Prototyping Platform API
what_it_does: Interactive prototyping platform with REST API — enabling UX designers to create high-fidelity interactive prototypes with animations, gestures, and realistic interactions for web and mobile, with sharing and feedback collection, user testing integrations, and iOS/Android preview apps.
use_cases: Creating and managing interactive prototypes via Proto.io API for project management integrations
Sharing prototypes and collecting stakeholder feedback via Proto.io sharing links
Integrating Proto.io with project management tools for design workflow automation
Querying prototype project and screen data for design audit reporting
Managing Proto.io team members and project permissions via API
not_for: Design system management and developer handoff (use Figma or Zeplin for specs)
Real-time collaboration on the same file (use Figma for live collaboration)
Code component prototyping (use UXPin Merge for code-accurate prototypes)
best_when: A UX designer needs highly animated, gesture-driven mobile prototypes with realistic interactions — especially for mobile-first products where gesture fidelity and animation quality matter for stakeholder presentations.
avoid_when: You need real-time collaboration, design-to-code handoff, design system management, or are primarily designing for web where Figma's prototype mode suffices.

auth.notes: API key from Proto.io account settings. HTTP Basic auth with API key as password (email as username). Account-scoped access. No webhooks — polling required. No OAuth2. iOS and Android native preview apps for device testing. Limited public API documentation. REST API for project and account management.

pricing.notes: Cyprus company (Limassol). Founded 2011. Bootstrapped and profitable. Niche prototyping tool with strong animation and gesture support. Known for high-fidelity mobile prototypes. Competitive pressure from Figma's improving prototype mode. Active user base for mobile-heavy design teams. iOS and Android native preview apps are key differentiator. No significant funding disclosures.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Limited REST API for project and account management. HTTP Basic auth with email + API key. Limited public API documentation. No webhooks — polling required. No SDK. Cyprus company with GDPR compliance. API is minimal — primary value is the prototyping tool itself, not API integration.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Project reads fully idempotent. Screen reads idempotent. Project creation not idempotent — check by name before creating.
known_agent_gotchas: HTTP Basic auth with email + API key — not standard bearer token pattern
Very limited public API — primarily for project management, not prototype content creation
No webhooks — must poll for project and feedback updates
No free tier — requires paid subscription to evaluate
Figma market pressure reducing proto.io's relevance for non-animation-heavy prototyping

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. EU data residency. HTTP Basic auth (weaker than Bearer token). Cyprus company with GDPR-first design. Prototype content may contain confidential product designs — restrict sharing link access. No scope granularity — API key provides full account access. Shared prototypes are accessible to anyone with link by default.
